name: Dr. Sarah Njenga
bio: Dr. Njenga is a leading AI researcher specializing in computer vision for agriculture. She has published 50+ papers and leads the AI lab at University of Nairobi.

name: Prof. David Ochieng
bio: Professor Ochieng leads the program committee and ensures a high-quality technical program. Expert in NLP and machine translation for African languages.

name: Grace Wambui
bio: Grace manages all logistics including venue, catering, accommodation, and on-site coordination. She ensures smooth conference operations.

name: James Kariuki
bio: James secures sponsorships and partnerships to make IndabaX Kenya possible. He builds relationships with companies and organizations.

name: Dr. Fatima Hassan
bio: Dr. Hassan coordinates all workshop activities, instructor selection, and hands-on sessions. Expert in healthcare AI applications.

name: Michael Mwangi
bio: Michael manages all communications, social media, marketing, and public relations for IndabaX Kenya.

name: Lucy Njeri
bio: Lucy recruits, trains, and manages the conference volunteer team. She ensures volunteers have a great experience while supporting the event.

name: Peter Kamau
bio: Peter manages the conference website, registration system, and all technology infrastructure including WiFi and AV equipment.

name: Esther Wanjiku
bio: Esther manages the conference budget, processes payments, handles reimbursements, and ensures financial compliance.

name: Daniel Kipchirchir
bio: Daniel coordinates student participation, manages student pass applications, and serves as the primary contact for student attendees.
